20230422_22.alt: Store display packed with vintage stuff like a Darth Vader mask, a cathode-ray tube TV with a game of Pac-Man on, a bunch of Playboys

20230422_23.alt: Silhouette of a person wearing glasses and a cap in a bookstore - the slate grey door says Black Spring Books in a script typeface

blurb: En serio, I realized a little while ago that I don't have many photos of daily observations from earlier in my life, so I'm trying to challenge myself to (1) notice more of the everyday around me and (2) remember to bring a camera with me when I go out for random walks or day outings, not just when traveling or seeing something "new", and (3) actually take some photos and share them. Here are a bunch of those snapshots from the last few years, roughly in geographic order from Queens to Manhattan to Brooklyn and east to west to south.
subtitle: Has anyone ever taken cool street photos in New York City and posted them on the internet? Well, you're welcome.
title: NYC street photos
